form.formComment: Comes here off a 48-day let-up. At the latest run 5th of 7 at this track on February 21 over 1308m, 15 len behind Gallant Knight with 55kg at $3.80. Before that 2nd in a small field at this track on February 7 over 1609m, 1.75 len behind Mr Scatter with 55kg at $3.60. Nicely placed to make amends.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start 2nd in a small field at this track on March 21 over 1609m, 5 len behind Brother Brad carrying 56kg at $2.20. The start before that came from midfield and won by a 0.3 len at this track January 18 over 1609m defeating Brother Brad with 55kg at $2. Well placed. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at Penn National July 17 over 1609m, 13 len behind Caughtandcollected carrying 55kg at $2.10.
